headline: Here's Why You Should Add Kiniksa Stock to Your Portfolio Now
summary: KNSA's Arcalyst sales continue to grow as raised 2026 revenue guidance and an expanding IL-1 pipeline reinforce Kiniksa's growth strategy.

headline: Beam Therapeutics: A Better Entry Point Is Likely Coming (Rating Downgrade)
summary: Beam Therapeutics could have a moat around its business due to Risto-cel showing competitive efficacy. See why BEAM stock is downgraded to a hold.
